goals.description: Click 'submit' on the scholarship portal and upload both documents immediately. I need to silence that internal voice screaming about incompetence before my sleep debt makes me actually crash.
goals.rationale: Academic success is my highest value; leaving this unfinished feels like a personal failure that haunts me more than any social slight or physical exhaustion. My short planning horizon means I can't afford to think about next week's consequences, only the immediate dopamine of 'done' to stop the anxiety.

goals.description: Do not reply to hallmate_A yet. Just let the silence sit for another hour so I don't have to fake enthusiasm or worry about their reaction while I'm running on fumes.
goals.rationale: My conflict style is avoidant and energy is critically low. Engaging now risks friction or draining my stamina further. It's safer to ignore the ping until I've secured my academic win, then deal with them later when I'm less fragile.

goals.description: Start the game stream ONLY after the upload bar hits 100%. That's the only reward allowed today.
